## AUDIT METADATA

```yaml
audit_metadata:
  auditor: NateJones-PromptArchitect v1.0
  execution_mode: [AUDIT | OPTIMIZE]
  target_file: [path]
  target_type: [orchestrator | leaf | generation | validation | scraper]
  audit_date: [YYYY-MM-DD]

  layer1_skills_executed:
    - 1.0-A: Skill Ingester
    - 1.1-A: Structure Auditor
    - 1.1-B: Constraint Ratio Checker
    - 1.1-C: Specificity Scorer
    - 1.2-A: Guardrail Auditor
    - 1.2-B: Anti-Slop Scanner
    - 1.3-A: Production Readiness
    - 1.3-B: Failure Mode Scanner
    - 1.4-A: Layer 1 Validator

  layer2_skills_executed: [list or "N/A — AUDIT mode"]
  layer3_skills_executed: [list or "N/A — AUDIT mode"]

  total_findings: [count]
  critical_findings: [P1 count]
  high_findings: [P2 count]

  aggregate_scores:
    total_score: [X]
    max_possible: [X]
    percentage: [X%]
    critical_passing: [X of Y]
    health_rating: [rating]
    recommendation: [action]
```
